basic_details.job_title: CNP Nashik SPMCIL – Junior Technician, Supervisor and More – 534 Posts
basic_details.short_information: CNP Nashik Recruitment 2026 offers 534 vacancies for Junior Technician, Supervisor and More posts. Eligible candidates with 10th / ITI / Diploma / Graduate / Post Graduate can apply online from 20-04-2026 to 03-06-2026 through the official CNP Nashik website, cnpnashik.spmcil.com.

selection_process: Computer Based Test (CBT) i.e. Online Test
how_to_apply: Candidates are required to apply online only through the official website cnpnashik.spmcil.com under the "Careers" section. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online application window is open from 20 April 2026 to 3 June 2026. Candidates must read the detailed advertisement carefully before applying and ensure all details provided are accurate. All updates including admit card, examination dates, and results will be available only on the official website.
seo_tags: CNP Nashik SPMCIL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 534 Junior Technician, Supervisor and More Posts
